title: Landing Page
baselinePrompt: Build a landing page for my product.
beautifulUiPrompt: Use beautiful-ui to design a conversion-focused landing page for a developer tool. Define the brand mood, hero media direction, typography, proof strategy, responsive layout, form validation, disabled submit, and success states.
expectedDelta: Moves from vague hero copy and generic feature cards to first-viewport product proof, CTA hierarchy, validation states, and mobile conversion flow.
